public static final class BotEvent.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<BotEvent.Builder> implements BotEventOrBuilder
A single message on the bot event stream.

    • hasSnapshot

      public boolean hasSnapshot()
      Initial snapshot or periodic resync. Sent once on stream open and any
time the server detects the client's view may have diverged.
      .soulfire.v1.BotLiveState snapshot = 1;
